title: Illegal -: select
body:
---


Author Name: **Jan Egil Ruud**
Original Redmine Issue: 717 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-02-19
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

The following code fail:
```
module t (/*AUTOARG*/
    // Outputs
    out,
    // Inputs
    clk, a0
    );

    input clk;
    input logic [2:0][1:0] a0;

    output logic [1:0][1:0] out;

    always @( a0 or clk) begin
       if ( clk == 1'b1) out = a0[2 -: 2];
    end

endmodule // t

```
The error is:
```
%Error: t_lint_illegal_selection.sv:19: Illegal +: or -: select; variable already selected, or bad dimension

```
(Line 19 is @if ( clk == 1'b1) out = a0[2 -: 2];@)

This code is accepted by VCS.
